# edgecenter_dbaas_backup (Resource)

Represent a manual DBaaS backup resource.

## Example Usage

```terraform
provider "edgecenter" {
  permanent_api_token = "251$d3361.............1b35f26d8"
}

resource "edgecenter_dbaas_backup" "example" {
  name        = "backup-example"
  project_id  = 1
  region_id   = 1
  cluster_id  = "080bbca5-1234-1234-1234-0bccd6f8f1b0"
  description = "Manual backup of the cluster"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `cluster_id` (String)
- `name` (String)

### Optional

- `description` (String)
- `parent_id` (String)
- `project_id` (Number)
- `project_name` (String)
- `region_id` (Number)
- `region_name` (String)
- `timeouts` (Block, Optional) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--timeouts))

### Read-Only

- `backup_type` (String)
- `created_at` (String)
- `creator_task_id` (String)
- `dbms` (List of Object) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--dbms))
- `finished_at` (String)
- `has_child` (Boolean)
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `is_service` (Boolean)
- `size` (Number)
- `status` (String)
- `task_id` (String)
- `updated_at` (String)

<a id="nestedblock--timeouts"></a>
### Nested Schema for `timeouts`

Optional:

- `create` (String)
- `delete` (String)
- `read` (String)
- `update` (String)


<a id="nestedatt--dbms"></a>
### Nested Schema for `dbms`

Read-Only:

- `type` (String)
- `version` (String)

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

```shell
# import using <project_id>:<region_id>:<backup_id> format
terraform import edgecenter_dbaas_backup.example 1:1:e13bd88d-79c8-4871-a9c2-a4baca741d0f
```
